$comment: Mythos Writer — Liquid Neon global design tokens. Accent colour is theme-driven (see themes.json + the six --n slots). These are the theme-independent tokens: neutrals, semantic colours, type, spacing, radius, borders, glow, blur, motion.

brand.tagline: A living workshop for worldbuilders — local-first, AI-assisted, yours to theme.
brand.markNote: Rounded-square app icon: open book + quill on a neon-violet field. Keep the rounded-square silhouette and neon rim-glow; do not place on busy backgrounds without the dark scrim.

referenceFeel.likeThe: depth & seriousness of Obsidian and Aeon Timeline (real tools, dense but navigable)
referenceFeel.withThe: luminous, glass-over-cosmos treatment of a Tron/cyberpunk HUD
referenceFeel.notLike: flat corporate SaaS, pastel gradients, generic Inter-on-white marketing pages

color.accentNote: The live accent is theme-driven — pull the six --n slots from themes.json. Neon Classic (#00f0ff / #9b5fff / #ff4dff) is the default / hero palette.

heading.use: story titles, part/chapter headings, dialog titles, editorial serifs

ui.use: all UI: nav, labels, buttons, body chrome

body.note: manuscript body is serif Lora at 1.8 line-height

spacing.note: Loose 2px base; common paddings 8–14px, panel gutters 12–20px.

glow.innerActive: inset 0 0 12px var(--soft)  — active nav rail / selected chips

motion.personality: Calm and ambient, never busy. One slow living background + micro-interactions. Honors prefers-reduced-motion (durations collapse to ~0).

signatures.lnFadeUp: menus & modals rise 6px + fade in over .12–.18s
signatures.neonAnimation: Off (per-theme idle shimmer) / Cycle (hue rotates) / Sparkle (palette fades), speed 0.25–30s — drives the window frame ring AND every panel border
signatures.ambience: per-theme particle layer — stardust, aurora motes, digital rain, embers, snow, spores, sparkles, rose dust

iconography.note: Line icons only; colour inherits currentColor / the active neon slot. No filled or duotone icon sets.

imagery.style: Dark cosmic / aurora photographic wallpapers behind frosted glass panels
imagery.treatment: Always sit content on the glass + scrim; per-theme wallpaper matches the palette. Placeholder art should be dark, atmospheric, high-contrast — never bright stock photography.
